title: The Reason for [the Muhallabids ') Escape from al-Hajjaj's Prison and Their Going to Sulayman
description: The Reason for [the Muhallabids ') Escape from al-Hajjaj's Prison and Their Going to Sulayman. Recorded under the year 89 AH (708–709 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 23.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 23
